title: AFK Manager Plus+
description: Manage AFK players with AFK Manager, a powerful and fully configurable AFK management mod.
body:
**💤 AFK Manager**

Take full control over AFK players on your server with AFK Manager — a powerful, configurable, and clean solution to manage inactivity without ruining the player experience.
⚙️ Features
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

🚫 Automatic AFK Kick
Players who are AFK for too long will be automatically removed from the server.

    Default: 15 minutes

**🛠️ Fully Configurable**

Customize everything in the anti_afk.json config file:

    ⏱️ Set AFK kick time

    🌍 Disable kicks in specific dimensions

    👑 Exempt server owners and high-permission players

    
```
{
  "afkTimeoutSeconds": 60,
  "afkKickMinutes": 15,
  "enableAfkKick": true,
  "excludeAfkFromSleep": true,
  "afkSafeZoneRadius": 30.0,
  "kickBlacklist": [],
  "safeZone": {
    "enabled": false,
    "dimension": "",
    "x": 0.0,
    "y": 0.0,
    "z": 0.0
  }
}
```
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
**
🗺️ AFK Zones System**

Create safe zones where players won’t be kicked while AFK.
Commands:

    /afkzone → Create an AFK zone (30 block radius)

    /afkzone clear → Remove all AFK zones

    /afk info → Locate active AFK zones

    ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
📊 Player Tracking

Stay informed about AFK players in real-time:

    /afk list → View:

        🧍 Who is AFK

        ⏳ How long they’ve been AFK

        🔁 How many times they’ve gone AFK

        ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
        
**👀 Visual AFK Indicator**

Easily see who is AFK directly in-game:

    Press TAB to open the player list

    💤 AFK players are clearly marked

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔒 Smart Permission System**

    Server owners are never kicked

    Players with high permissions are protected

    Perfect for admins, staff, and builders

    ![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)


![intelji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod is created with: intellij

#AD
